chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-2045 / 2024 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ DIRECTIONS For orders on Misc. No. 25837/2025. 12.02.2026. Mr. Afaque Ahmed, Advocate for Petitioner. Mr. Mehran Khan, AAG. M/s. Ghulam Akbar Lashari & Gul Afshan, Advocates for Respondent (SBCA). ___________________ Comments / report filed on behalf of SBCA shows that the matter is subjudice before the Appellate Committee of SBCA today. The Appellate Committee of SBCA is directed to decide the appeal of the Petitioner within two weeks. In view of the above, the Petitioner is satisfied and does not press contempt application which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
